title: artemisia dracunculus subsp. dracunculina
intro: Artemisia dracunculus subsp. dracunculina, commonly known as wild tarragon or Russian tarragon, is a perennial plant belonging to the genus Artemisia in the sunflower family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its health benefits. The health benefits of Artemisia dracunculus subsp. dracunculina include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and aiding in the relief of cold and flu symptoms. Artemisia dracunculus subsp. dracunculina can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
